files.content:
<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
    <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #stencil-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="stencil-logo">
        <title>Stencil</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M8.85 15.66h9.25l-5 5.34H3.9ZM24 9.328H4.997L0 14.672h19.003ZM10.884 3H20.1l-4.977 5.34H5.9Z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
